title: Add permissions field to stat() result across all backends
description: PRD §2 requires stat() to return { size, mtime, isDirectory, permissions }. Currently permissions is not exposed. Add a permissions field (string like 'rw-r--r--' or object {read,write}) to stat() return type in types.ts and implement in all backends: AgenticStoreBackend, OPFSBackend, NodeFsBackend, MemoryBackend, SQLiteBackend, LocalStorageBackend. Add tests. Target: PRD §2 gap.
